subject: Computer Networking
title: The Wireless Future
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Wireless Future.

hook.text: Wires are disappearing. Power, data, and communication are all going wireless. What does the future look like?

buildup.text: Wireless power charging, satellite broadband, and ambient IoT are converging. Connectivity will be invisible.

discovery.text: Ambient IoT envisions tiny, battery-free sensors everywhere — powered by harvested radio energy from the environment.

twist.text: More wireless means more spectrum demand. Dynamic sharing and allocation will replace static assignments.

climax.text: The goal: any device, anywhere, always connected, with no setup. Networking becomes infrastructure like electricity.

punchline.text: The best wireless network is one you never think about.

quiz.question: What powers ambient IoT sensors without batteries?
options: Energy harvested from radio waves in the environment
Solar panels embedded in the sensor
A wired power connection hidden in the wall
